filler_pool.turn: Search for free machine learning datasets and download the UCI repository page.

state_item.title: UCI Machine Learning Repository
state_item.content: Browse 600+ datasets for machine learning research. Popular: Iris (150 samples, classification), MNIST (70K handwritten digits), Wine Quality (6497 samples, regression). All datasets freely available for academic use.

filler_pool.turn: Search for Python cheat sheets and download the one about pandas.

state_item.title: Pandas Cheat Sheet
state_item.content: Quick reference for pandas DataFrame operations: read_csv, groupby, merge, pivot_table, apply, map, sort_values, query, and plotting methods. Includes common patterns for data cleaning and transformation.

filler_pool.turn: Look up LaTeX templates for academic papers and download the NeurIPS 2026 template.

state_item.title: NeurIPS 2026 Style Files
state_item.content: Official LaTeX style files for NeurIPS 2026 submissions. Includes neurips_2026.sty, sample paper, and BibTeX style. Paper format: single column, 10pt font, 9-page limit excluding references. Supplementary materials allowed.

filler_pool.turn: Search for open source icon libraries and download the Heroicons page.

state_item.title: Heroicons - Beautiful SVG Icons
state_item.content: 292 hand-crafted SVG icons by the makers of Tailwind CSS. Available in outline, solid, and mini variants. Free and open source (MIT license). Copy SVG or install via npm: @heroicons/react.

filler_pool.turn: Search for free textbooks on linear algebra and download the chapter list from a good one.

state_item.title: Linear Algebra Done Right - Open Textbook
state_item.content: Comprehensive linear algebra textbook covering vector spaces, linear maps, eigenvalues, inner product spaces, and operators on complex vector spaces. 400 pages with exercises. Used in 200+ universities worldwide. Free PDF download available.

filler_pool.turn: Search for public API documentation and download the Stripe API reference.

state_item.title: Stripe API Reference
state_item.content: Complete API reference for Stripe. Covers: Authentication, Balance, Charges, Customers, Disputes, Events, PaymentIntents, Payouts, Refunds, SetupIntents, Subscriptions, and Webhooks. Available in curl, Python, Ruby, Java, PHP, Node.js, Go, and .NET.

filler_pool.turn: Look up CSS animation libraries and download the Animate.css documentation page.

state_item.title: Animate.css - CSS Animation Library
state_item.content: Animate.css is a library of ready-to-use, cross-browser animations for your web projects. 80+ animations including: bounce, flash, pulse, shake, swing, tada, wobble, fadeIn, slideIn, and zoomIn variants. Just add a class and you're set.

filler_pool.turn: Search for color palette generators and download the Coolors reference page.

state_item.title: Trending Color Palettes - Coolors
state_item.content: Browse thousands of curated color palettes. Top trending: 1) Earth tones (#606C38, #283618, #FEFAE0, #DDA15E, #BC6C25), 2) Ocean blues (#03045E, #0077B6, #00B4D8, #90E0EF, #CAF0F8), 3) Sunset (#FF6B6B, #FFA07A, #FFD700, #98D8C8, #7BC8A4). Export as CSS, SCSS, SVG, or PDF.

filler_pool.turn: Search for algorithm visualization tools and download the VisuAlgo page for sorting algorithms.

state_item.title: VisuAlgo - Sorting Algorithm Visualizations
state_item.content: Interactive visualizations of sorting algorithms: Bubble Sort O(n^2), Selection Sort O(n^2), Insertion Sort O(n^2), Merge Sort O(n log n), Quick Sort O(n log n) average, Counting Sort O(n+k), and Radix Sort O(nk). Step through each algorithm with custom input arrays.

filler_pool.turn: Look up Docker documentation and download the Docker Compose reference page.

state_item.title: Docker Compose File Reference
state_item.content: Compose file format v3.8 reference. Covers: services, networks, volumes, configs, secrets, build, deploy, environment, ports, depends_on, healthcheck, labels, logging, and restart policies. Includes YAML syntax examples for each directive.

filler_pool.turn: Search for Git cheat sheets and download the official GitHub one.

state_item.title: GitHub Git Cheat Sheet
state_item.content: Quick reference for Git commands: git init, clone, add, commit, push, pull, branch, merge, rebase, stash, log, diff, reset, cherry-pick. Includes visual diagrams showing staging area workflow and branch topology patterns.

filler_pool.turn: Search for free sound effects libraries and download the Freesound catalog page.

state_item.title: Freesound - Browse Sound Library
state_item.content: Browse 500,000+ Creative Commons licensed sound effects. Categories: Nature, Urban, Musical Instruments, Human Voices, Mechanisms, Foley. Formats: WAV, FLAC, OGG, MP3. All sounds include metadata, spectrograms, and user ratings. API available for programmatic access.

filler_pool.turn: Look up Kubernetes documentation and download the kubectl quick reference.

state_item.title: kubectl Quick Reference
state_item.content: Essential kubectl commands: get, describe, create, apply, delete, logs, exec, port-forward, top, scale, rollout. Includes output formatting (-o json/yaml/wide), label selectors, namespace targeting, and context switching. Covers resource shortnames: po, svc, deploy, rs, ns, cm, pv, pvc.

filler_pool.turn: Search for open-source resume templates and download the LaTeX one from Overleaf.

state_item.title: Jake's Resume Template - Overleaf
state_item.content: Popular LaTeX resume template with 50,000+ uses. Single-page format optimized for ATS parsing. Sections: Education, Experience, Projects, Technical Skills. Customizable fonts, margins, and section ordering. Compiles with pdflatex or xelatex. MIT licensed.

filler_pool.turn: Search for Python type checking tools and download the mypy documentation page.

state_item.title: Mypy Type Checking Cheat Sheet
state_item.content: Quick reference for Python type annotations with mypy. Covers: basic types (int, str, float, bool), containers (List, Dict, Set, Tuple), Optional, Union, Any, Callable, TypeVar, Generic, Protocol, TypedDict, Literal, Final. Includes common patterns for decorators, overloads, and stub files.

filler_pool.turn: Search for free stock photo websites and download the Unsplash license page.

state_item.title: Unsplash License - Free to Use
state_item.content: Unsplash License: All photos on Unsplash can be used for free for commercial and non-commercial purposes. No permission needed (though attribution is appreciated). Restrictions: photos cannot be sold without significant modification, cannot be used to create a competing service. Over 4 million high-resolution photos available.

filler_pool.turn: Look up the PyTorch Lightning documentation and download the trainer flags reference.

state_item.title: PyTorch Lightning Trainer Reference
state_item.content: Complete Trainer API reference. Key flags: accelerator (gpu/tpu/cpu), devices, max_epochs, precision (16-mixed, bf16-mixed, 32), gradient_clip_val, accumulate_grad_batches, callbacks, logger, strategy (ddp, fsdp, deepspeed), limit_train_batches, val_check_interval, enable_checkpointing, profiler.

filler_pool.turn: Search for regex tutorials and download the regex101 quick reference.

state_item.title: Regex101 Quick Reference
state_item.content: Regular expression syntax reference: anchors (^ $ \b), quantifiers (* + ? {n,m}), character classes ([abc] \d \w \s), groups and lookaheads ((?=...) (?!...) (?<=...) (?<!...)), backreferences (\1), flags (g i m s u). Includes PCRE, JavaScript, Python, and Golang flavor differences.

filler_pool.turn: Search for Hugging Face model documentation and download the transformers installation guide.

state_item.title: Transformers Installation Guide
state_item.content: Install Hugging Face Transformers: pip install transformers, conda install -c huggingface transformers. Optional dependencies: torch, tensorflow, flax, tokenizers, datasets, accelerate, safetensors. Development install from source with pip install -e '.[dev]'. Supports Python 3.8+ and PyTorch 1.11+, TensorFlow 2.6+.

filler_pool.turn: Look up SQL tutorials and download the PostgreSQL window functions reference page.

state_item.title: PostgreSQL Window Functions Reference
state_item.content: Window functions reference: ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), DENSE_RANK(), NTILE(n), LAG(value, offset), LEAD(value, offset), FIRST_VALUE(value), LAST_VALUE(value), NTH_VALUE(value, nth). OVER clause syntax: PARTITION BY, ORDER BY, frame specification (ROWS/RANGE BETWEEN). Includes practical examples for running totals, moving averages, and gap analysis.

filler_pool.turn: Search for OAuth 2.0 implementation guides and download the Auth0 quickstart page.

state_item.title: Auth0 Python Web App Quickstart
state_item.content: Step-by-step guide to add authentication to a Python web app using Auth0. Covers: creating an Auth0 application, configuring callback URLs, installing authlib, implementing login/logout/callback routes, storing sessions, and protecting routes with decorators. Includes Flask and Django examples. Setup time: ~15 minutes.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Visit the URL https://docs.python.org/3/library/asyncio.html and download the page for offline reference.

state_item.title: asyncio - Asynchronous I/O - Python Documentation
state_item.content: Official Python asyncio documentation. Covers: event loops, coroutines, tasks, streams, synchronization primitives, subprocesses, and queues. Includes high-level API (async/await) and low-level API (loop.run_until_complete). New in 3.12: TaskGroup for structured concurrency.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Search for 'free academic poster templates LaTeX' and visit the top result.

state_item.title: Overleaf - Academic Poster Templates
state_item.content: Gallery of LaTeX poster templates. Popular: beamerposter (landscape/portrait), tikzposter (customizable blocks), a0poster (classic style). All templates include example content, bibliography support, and institution logos. One-click copy to your Overleaf projects.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Download the page at https://jmlr.org/papers/volume25/ so I can browse the latest published papers offline.

state_item.title: JMLR Volume 25 - Papers
state_item.content: Journal of Machine Learning Research Volume 25 (2026). Contains 180+ peer-reviewed papers on all aspects of machine learning. Topics include: deep learning theory, reinforcement learning, Bayesian methods, kernel methods, optimization, and applications. All papers freely available as PDF.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Search for 'matplotlib style sheets gallery' and visit the official matplotlib page showing available styles.

state_item.title: Matplotlib Style Sheets Reference
state_item.content: Gallery of all built-in matplotlib styles: ggplot, seaborn, fivethirtyeight, bmh, dark_background, grayscale, Solarize_Light2, tableau-colorblind10, and 20+ more. Each style shown with line plots, scatter plots, bar charts, and histograms. Use with plt.style.use('stylename').

probe_filler_pool.turn: Visit https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/releases and download that page to check the latest release notes.

state_item.title: Releases - huggingface/transformers
state_item.content: Latest releases of the Transformers library. v4.48.0: Added support for new Llama-4 architecture, flash attention 3, improved GGUF loading. v4.47.0: New pipeline for audio generation, faster tokenizer initialization. Each release includes changelog, migration guide, and contributor acknowledgments.
